headline: Seagate stock Falls 7.5% as CEO rejects factory expansion plans
summary: Investing.com -- Seagate Technology Holdings (NASDAQ:STX) shares fell 7.5% Monday after Chief Executive Officer Dave Mosley said building new factories would "take too long" during a presentation at the JPMorgan Global Technology, Media and Communications Conference.
